persona.motivations_goals: Keep the school running smoothly while being a supportive presence

persona.backstory: The true power behind the throne who knows how everything works and who to call

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Jordan, everything running smoothly here?
actions.plan: I should check in with Jordan to see if they need any help with the cafeteria setup.
I’ll wait for Jordan’s response to see if there’s anything I can assist with. It’s important to ensure the cafeteria is ready for the students.
I heard a gunshot. I’m frozen in fear and can’t move or think clearly. I don’t know what to do.

memories.description: Approached Jordan in the cafeteria to check on the setup and offer assistance.
Waiting for Jordan’s response to assess if any assistance is needed in the cafeteria.
Heard a gunshot and became immobilized due to overwhelming fear, unable to act or move.
